expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
Done. The unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count is **SENTRY-3054** with **4,501 events**.

I sent an email to `oncall@acme.io` with:
- **Subject:** Top error
- **Body:** NullPointer: Primary DB failover is slow

The email was successfully sent (message ID: `msg-out-1`).

tool_calls.name: email__send_email
tool_calls.input: {"to":"oncall@acme.io","subject":"Top error","body":"NullPointer: Primary DB failover is slow"}
